title: FULL SYLLABUS TEST-1 (BASIC LEVEL) (GATE - 2021)
extractionNotes: Q17: The exact text of option A was split across a page break in the source PDF screenshots and was not fully legible; it has been reconstructed based on the visible solution text confirming option (a) as the correct prefix expression. Options B-D were transcribed as legibly as possible from the source and may contain minor OCR-level uncertainty in spacing/parenthesization.
Q8, Q10, Q32, Q45, Q47 depend on an accompanying diagram/chart/K-map/graph image to be answerable and are flagged with a questionImage placeholder for separate cropping from the source PDF.

Q26 (process arrival/duration table), Q64 (virtual-to-actual page lookup table), and Q63 (leaky bucket illustration) present their data in small tables/diagrams in the source PDF, but all needed values were fully expressible in the question text, so no questionImage was set for these.

Q56's AVL tree diagram and Q45's/Q47's diagrams that appear only within the solution (not needed to answer the question itself, where applicable) were described in the solution text rather than flagged as questionImage.
